name: Triton International Ltd
business: Triton is the world's largest lessor of intermodal containers. We lease and sell intermodal containers and chassis. Our primary customers include the world's largest container shipping lines.

exposures.sentence: Triton is the world's largest lessor of intermodal containers.

catalysts.sentence: We have invested $327.2 million in new containers of which $129.1 million is for delivery in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Container lessors owned approximately 24.2 million TEU, or approximately 50% of the total worldwide container fleet as of the end of 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that container lessors owned approximately 24.2 million TEU, or approximately 50% of the total worldwide container fleet as of the end of 2023.
